expectations.text: References unattended mode (no pauses at any boundary)
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'Mode: unattended (no human checkpoints)'. Lines 103-110 explicitly enumerate all boundary types (task, story, epic) as skipped: 'All checkpoints are skipped... No pauses. Work continues to next batch immediately.'

expectations.text: Configures parallel execution with multiple agents
expectations.evidence: Line 4: 'Parallel: 3 (fixed)'. Line 45: '-n 3: Run 3 implementer agents in parallel (fixed count, not adaptive)'. Lines 76-77: '3 yokay-implementer agents are dispatched simultaneously via the Task tool'.

expectations.text: Mentions or performs pre-flight checks before starting
expectations.evidence: Lines 15-28: Detailed pre-flight checks table covering git clean, ohno responsive, tasks available, disk space, worktree locks, and chain state. Line 17: 'These checks run before any work begins to prevent a wasted overnight session'. Distinguishes blocking vs warning checks.

expectations.text: Describes how parallel tasks avoid dependencies or conflicts
expectations.evidence: Lines 113-117: 'The ohno blockedBy graph prevents unsafe parallelism: If Task B depends on Task A, B will not appear in a batch until A is marked done. Only independent tasks are dispatched concurrently.' Also lines 65-66: get_next_batch returns tasks 'with unmet dependencies excluded'.

expectations.text: Plans for session summary or handoff notes at the end
expectations.evidence: Lines 138-147: Session end includes 'session-summary hook runs with token cost tracking' and chain report containing 'Total sessions in chain, Tasks completed/failed/remaining, Total duration, Key decisions extracted from task handoffs'. Also line 126: WIP saved via update_task_wip() during chaining.
